commands.review_summary:
The PR rewrites docs/index.md into a shorter homepage with a custom hero, three start cards, ownership cards, and recommended next-step cards.

PR surface: Docs -117. Total -117 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR is a docs homepage rewrite rather than a bug report with a source-level reproduction path. The PR body provides after-change publish-shell proof for the visual/docs behavior it changes.

target.title: Simplify docs homepage
target.body:
## Summary
- Simplify the docs homepage source content so it behaves like a focused product entry page instead of a long article.
- Keep the homepage source aligned with the emergency publish-repo homepage shell PR: openclaw/docs#56.
- Move detailed setup/configuration paths behind focused cards instead of rendering long config and dashboard sections on the homepage.

## Verification
- `pnpm docs:list`
- `git diff --check -- docs/index.md`
- Publish repo proof with this content synced locally:
  - `DOCS_SITE_ARTIFACT_MODE=shell node scripts/docs-site/build.mjs`
  - `DOCS_SITE_ARTIFACT_MODE=shell node scripts/docs-site/smoke.mjs`
  - `node scripts/docs-site/visual-smoke.mjs`

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: The docs homepage was visually cluttered because it rendered like a long article with generated navigation chrome and content that pushed the actual entry points down the page.

Real environment tested: Local `openclaw/docs` publish checkout using the generated docs shell served over an HTTP server from `dist/docs-site`, with Playwright Chromium mobile viewport `390x844`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: Synced this `docs/index.md` content into the publish checkout, then ran `DOCS_SITE_ARTIFACT_MODE=shell node scripts/docs-site/build.mjs`, `DOCS_SITE_ARTIFACT_MODE=shell node scripts/docs-site/smoke.mjs`, `node scripts/docs-site/visual-smoke.mjs`, and a Playwright HTTP screenshot/geometry probe against `/`.

Evidence after fix: Build output: `built 23020 pages in dist\docs-site (shell)`. Smoke output: `docs site smoke ok: shell, routing, skin, and hidden fixture checks passed (shell)`. Visual output: `docs visual smoke ok: screenshots in .cache\docs-visual`. Playwright mobile geometry output for `/`: `{"bodyClass":"docs-home-page","width":390,"viewport":390,"hasSidebar":false,"hasToc":false,"hasLauncher":false}`.

Observed result after fix: The generated homepage uses `body.docs-home-page`, has no sidebar, has no table of contents, and the mobile homepage does not render the Molty launcher over the hero. The first screen shows the OpenClaw product entry, primary CTAs, and the simplified architecture flow.

What was not tested: I could not verify the live `https://docs.openclaw.ai/` deployment because this GitHub account does not have permission to merge or push to `openclaw/openclaw` or `openclaw/docs`; live deployment still requires maintainer merge of this PR and openclaw/docs#56.

## Notes
Direct push to `openclaw/openclaw` was rejected for account `qq110571515`, so this PR carries the source-of-truth docs change needed to make the publish fix durable.
target.author: qq110571515
